texts.label: text
texts.orig: During 4 th to 14 th Jan, 2019 one Employability Enhancement Training Programme had been organised by ICT Academy in Women's Polytechnic campus as per MoU with AICTE. Jan, 2019 one Employability Enhancement Training Programme had been organised by ICT Academy in Women's with AICTE.

texts.orig: 3. One Day Workshop on HIV:
texts.text: 3. One Day Workshop on HIV:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A one day workshop on 'Blood Borne Virus HIV: Monitoring the Burden' was organised by Red Ribbon Club and NSS unit of Women's collaboration with Tripura State Aids Control Society on 25 A one day workshop on 'Blood Borne Virus HIV: Monitoring the Burden' was organised by Red Ribbon Club and NSS unit of Women's Polytechnic, Hapania in collaboration with Tripura State Aids Control Society on 25 th Jan, 2019.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 4. Pariksha Pe Charcha:
texts.text: 4. Pariksha Pe Charcha:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The students and teachers of the institute had participated in the exciting edition of interaction with Prime Minister on Pariksha Pe Charcha 2.0 on the 29 th of January 2019. Prime Minister Sri Narendra Modi had an interaction with a cross section of students, teachers and parents focusing on various aspects of different examinations and other issues.
texts.text: The students and teachers of the institute had participated in the exciting edition of interaction with Prime Minister on Pariksha Pe Charcha 2.0 on the 29 th of January 2019. Prime Minister Sri Narendra Modi had an interaction with a cross section of students, teachers and parents focusing on various aspects of different examinations and other issues.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 2.  Youth Parliament Screening:
texts.text: 2.  Youth Parliament Screening:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: As per the directives of Department of Youth Affairs  &  Sports,  Govt.  of  Tripura,  the  Youth Parliament Screening was organized on 18.01.2019 in the institute conference room as a  part  of  National  Youth  Parliament  Festival 2019. The participants had given talks on social issues.
texts.text: As per the directives of Department of Youth Affairs  &  Sports,  Govt.  of  Tripura,  the  Youth Parliament Screening was organized on 18.01.2019 in the institute conference room as a  part  of  National  Youth  Parliament  Festival 2019. The participants had given talks on social issues.

texts.orig: 5. Annual Sports 2019
texts.text: 5. Annual Sports 2019

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The students, faculty and staff participated in the Annual Sports programme during 1 st Feb- 4 th 2019 with full enthusiasm and spirit. Besides the Track and field events, needle throw and tugwar had been the special attraction in this year. The winners of different events were awarded with trophies and certificates. texts.orig: 7. Participation in 'Science Exhibition' on National Science Day: Participation in 'Science Exhibition' on National Science Day:
texts.text: 7. Participation in 'Science Exhibition' on National Science Day: Participation in 'Science Exhibition' on National Science Day:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: As a part of celebration of National Science Day, the students of the institute had exhibited science models at Sukanta Academy, Agartala on 28th Feb 2019. The models presented by the students of our institute were highly appreciated by Sri Sudip Roy Barman, Hon'ble Minister of Science, Technology and Environment, Govt. of Tripura. As a part of celebration of National Science Day, the students of the institute had exhibited science models at Sukanta Academy, Agartala on 28th Feb 2019. The models presented by the students of our institute were highly appreciated by Sri n, Hon'ble Minister of Science, Technology and Environment, Govt.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: 8. One Week Workshop on Ergonomics for Women: 8. One Week Workshop on Ergonomics for Women:
texts.text: 8. One Week Workshop on Ergonomics for Women: 8. One Week Workshop on Ergonomics for Women:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: One week workshop on 'Ergonomics for Women'' had been organised during 11-15 March 2019, in which eminent speaker from Debamalya Banerjee, Production Engg. Department delivered his lecture. Dr. Swarup Paul, Dr. Kishan Choudhuri and Sri Suman Deb from NIT Agartala had also delivered invited lectures on the occasion. Hon'ble MLA Sri Ram Prasad Paul, as the Chief Guest had inaugurated the Workshop. MLT Laboratory Visit for Skill Development on Health & Allied Subject was conducted as a part of the Workshop on Ergonomics. One week workshop on 'Ergonomics for Women'' had been organised during 15 March 2019, in which eminent speaker from Jadavpur University Prof. Debamalya Banerjee, Production Engg. Department delivered his lecture. Dr. Swarup Paul, Dr. Kishan Choudhuri and Sri Suman Deb from NIT Agartala had also delivered invited lectures on the occasion. texts.orig: 9. Mock Interview:
texts.text: 9. Mock Interview:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In  order  to  make  our  students  job  ready, had  been  organised  on  25th  and  26th  March  2019.  A committee under the Chairmanship of the Principal works in support  of  Training  and  Placement  cell  of  the  institute  in order  to  make  students  job  ready  and  holds  such  mock interview  twice  for  all the  6th  Semester  students  of  the institute. texts.orig: 13. Initiation of Procurement through GeM:
texts.text: 13. Initiation of Procurement through GeM:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The GeM Committee is formed in Women's Polytechnic, Hapania, for the very first time in March 2019 in order to promote transparency and savings in procurement process. texts.orig: 10. Placement of Students: As many as 33 students have received call letters from two firms namely BankZone after they did successfully clear the off-campus interviews on 25/03/2019 organised by ICT Academy. 10. Placement of Students: As many as 33 students have received call letters from two firms namely BankZone and VAP Technologies Ltd, after they did successfully clear the campus interviews on 25/03/2019 organised by ICT Academy.
